title: Focus Management & UX Polish
description: Fix focus management in modal/dialog components: trap focus in Tags DeleteConfirmModal, make FeedbackWidget close button label specific, add skip-to-content link to NavBar for keyboard users, improve ApplicationRow drag handle accessibility, add visible focus ring to KanbanCard, and add loading state to the ManualAddForm submit button.

userStories.title: Trap focus in Tags page DeleteConfirmModal
userStories.description: Tags.jsx DeleteConfirmModal opens a confirmation dialog but does not trap focus. Keyboard users can tab out of the modal into the page behind it. Add focus trapping so Tab and Shift+Tab cycle only within the modal while it is open. On close, return focus to the delete button that triggered the modal.
acceptanceCriteria: Tags.jsx DeleteConfirmModal traps focus while open — Tab and Shift+Tab cycle only within the modal
When the modal closes (confirm or cancel), focus returns to the element that triggered it
The modal already has role='dialog' or equivalent — focus trap is in addition to existing attributes
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Make FeedbackWidget close button aria-label more specific
userStories.description: FeedbackWidget.jsx close button has aria-label='Close'. In the context of an open feedback widget, 'Close' alone is ambiguous. Change the aria-label to 'Close feedback' so screen reader users know what they are closing.
acceptanceCriteria: FeedbackWidget.jsx close button aria-label is 'Close feedback' instead of 'Close'
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add skip-to-content link to NavBar
userStories.description: NavBar.jsx has no skip navigation link, forcing keyboard-only users to tab through all navigation items on every page load. Add a visually hidden 'Skip to main content' link as the first focusable element in NavBar that becomes visible on focus and links to #main-content. Ensure the main content area of pages that use NavBar has id='main-content'.
acceptanceCriteria: NavBar.jsx renders a 'Skip to main content' anchor as its first focusable element
The link is visually hidden by default (sr-only or equivalent) and becomes visible when focused
The link href is '#main-content'
JobBoard.jsx and Dashboard.jsx (or their main content areas) have id='main-content' on the content <main> element
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add accessible label to ApplicationRow drag handle
userStories.description: ApplicationRow.jsx renders a drag handle (GripVertical icon or similar) with no accessible name. Screen readers announce it as an unlabeled interactive element. Add aria-label='Drag to reorder' (or similar) and aria-roledescription='sortable item' to the drag handle element.
acceptanceCriteria: ApplicationRow.jsx drag handle has aria-label='Drag to reorder' or equivalent
The drag handle also has aria-roledescription='sortable item' to clarify the interaction model
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add visible focus ring to KanbanCard
userStories.description: KanbanCard.jsx is keyboard-focusable (tabIndex=0 or draggable) but may not have a visible focus ring. Ensure the card has focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:outline-none Tailwind classes so keyboard users can see which card is focused.
acceptanceCriteria: KanbanCard.jsx card element has focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary (or equivalent visible focus indicator) in its className
The focus ring only appears on keyboard focus (focus-visible), not on mouse click
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add loading state to ManualAddForm submit button
userStories.description: ManualAddForm.jsx submit button has no loading state. When the form is submitted, the user gets no feedback that the request is in progress, and may click multiple times. Add a loading prop or mutation isPending check: disable the button and show a spinner or 'Saving…' text while the mutation is pending.
acceptanceCriteria: ManualAddForm.jsx submit button is disabled while the mutation is pending
While pending, the button shows a loading indicator (spinner icon or 'Saving…' text)
After success or error, the button returns to its normal state
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add NotificationBell panel role and aria-label
userStories.description: NotificationBell.jsx notification panel div has no role or aria-label. Screen reader users cannot identify the panel as a distinct region. Add role='region' and aria-label='Notifications' to the panel container.
acceptanceCriteria: NotificationBell.jsx notification panel has role='region' and aria-label='Notifications'
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-live result count announcement to CommandPalette
userStories.description: CommandPalette.jsx shows filtered results as the user types but never announces the result count to screen readers. Add an aria-live='polite' region that announces the number of results (e.g., '5 results') when the filtered list changes.
acceptanceCriteria: CommandPalette.jsx has an aria-live='polite' element (visually hidden) that updates with the result count when filtering changes
The announcement text is '0 results' when empty, 'N results' otherwise
The element has aria-atomic='true' so the full count is re-announced on each update
Build passes with no errors
